title: (Bearish Signal) HEES enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on Apr 20, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that HEES's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Ticker's A.I.dvisor backtested 84 similar cases where HEES's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 70 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $37.66 crossed the resistance line at $38.17 and is trading between $38.17 resistance and $36.03 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/18/21 - 04/20/21, the price experienced a +4% Uptrend, while the week of 04/13/21 - 04/20/21 shows a -0.27% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/rphfphuf9ku61.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=abc85bb84c1906d0b1e1e852a9b13f67be8b0094

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on April 20, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on HEES as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 70 of 84 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 83%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for HEES turned negative on April 20, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 48 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 35 of the 48 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 73%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where HEES declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 76%.
